channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 2 street lights out, 5th March
item.description:
2 streetlights out on left hand side of Laxton road on bend
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laxton Road, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two road signs left by contractore, 5th March
item.description:
The sigs are by the waste bins on either side of thejunction of Two Hedges Road and Crown Drive They have been there for many months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25,27, Harpfield Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Loose manhole cover, 5th March
item.description:
This issue has not been resolved, I walked past it this evening & the cover is still rocking & making a loud noise each time a vehicle passes over it. I suggest you check the quality of the service your contactors are providing to you. Original report read- Loose metal drain cover in road rocks & bangs each time a vehicle passes over it. The volume has increased & I think that the range of movement has increased to match, there may come a point when it fails. I can hear it clearly day & night at the end of Chatsworth Drive, those living closer must really be disturbed by the constant noise. Also, as the movement increases the likelihood that it will become more of a hazard, damage car tyres or unseating cyclists becomes more likely. Drain cover in Leckhampton Road, in the southbound/up hill lane immediately by the end of Chatsworth Drive. Previously reported, I had an email stating it had been fixed today but nothing seems to have changed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 194, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned caravan, 5th March
item.description:
Abandoned caravan which is being vandalised.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookfield Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole on sandford mill road, 5th March
item.description:
Pot hole on road reasonably close to the post box. No photos unfortunately as I was on my way to work at CGH and it was dark
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Sandford Mill Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 Large Cones 3rd time of report, 5th March
item.description:
It is now March. I first reported this fly tipping by Glosc Highways in November 2025. The street sign has been stolen but the cones remain. Social media report coming up and Councillor contact. I JUST CAN'T BELIEVE HOW INEFFICIENT HIGHWAYS HAS BECOME SINCE MY TIME AT GCC.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65b, Moorend Crescent, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1. Several potholes and poor road surface over 2 or 3 square meters. One very deep pothole which most people swerve around. Its dangerous. And 2. Two or Three deep channels in the centre of the road need immediate attention., 5th March
item.description:
Between the junction between Leckhampton Lane and Meadowsweet Road and for a distance of 30 meters in a north east direction towards Leckhampton.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement, 5th March
item.description:
Rubbish and furniture dumped on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edinburgh Place, St Mark's, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on drain cover, 5th March
item.description:
Drain cover just past the coop on Parton road churchdown has a large chunk of tarmac gone making the drain cover poke out onto the road making it dangerous for bikes or cars as the corner is poking through
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Parton Road, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 ft long and deep pothole outside 160 old bath road., 5th March
item.description:
Eastern side of road heading from tennis club towards Mead Road. Outside 169 Old Bath Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Old Bath Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pothole as you come out of Haymans close onto Greenhills road, 5th March
item.description:
Issue has been present for months. Pothole has got deeper and wider. Needs urgent repair There is a disabled person who tripped on it this week!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Greenhills Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop sign for 18b is broken, meaning stop name not visible, 5th March
item.description:
Sign with the bus stop name is broken for 18B by Primark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 197-199, High Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various potholes on Elmfield rd, 5th March
item.description:
Potholes near No 6,12,17,27 also on junction with Elmfield Ave .. whole road surface is uneven
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Midwinter Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Row of potholes, 5th March
item.description:
Row of big, deep potholes following the line of a previous infilled roadworks trench starting outside no 140a and running northbound to pedestrian crossing. One or two holes close to the crossing have been filled today, but the rest have just been left.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140a, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Junction markings require a refresh.
Report on FixMyStreet
